title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NHB Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NHB Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
NHB Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHB Holdings Services:
NHB Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHB Holdings Services!
